rationale: The ensures is `LHS ==> det_set_equal`, so the LHS conjuncts are not free hypotheses; the previous attempt asserted them at top level and failed. Wrap the proof inside an `if` matching the LHS, then derive `post1_self_.seq@ =~= post2_self_.seq@` by transitivity through `pre_self_.seq@.update(i,out)`, lift it to Ghost equality, and note `r1 == r2` trivially since both are unit.
